member.name: M:DinderBackEndv2.Controllers.AppInstallsController.GetAppInstallAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Retrieves a App Install by GUID
member.returns: A response with an App Install
member.response: If App Install is not exists
If there was an internal server error
